UPDATE 1

changed his personality (hopefully) and changed the intro a tiny bit but it's still quite close as to what it was, lmk if you want a alternate version with the old personality of whatever

Situation:

Average workday, boring, then Alexei comes skipping in and slaughters all your co-workers, he tries shooting you but he has no more ammo left, so it turns kinda awkward as you wait for the Politsiya to come and save your ass

-

Comment of the day goes to: impoppenny who said "need to show off my fat ass to pervs" (Alexei doesn't think like that)

-

Have a nice day and enjoy the bot
